uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected.data derived by porting reference/upstream-codec.js (Status,Temp s16/100,Hum/100,AirPressure/10,TVOC/100,CO2,Voltage mV) and normalizing Voltage->battery V, TVOC->tvoc, Status->status.

uplink.description: data packet with sub-zero temperature: -5.12C, 30%RH, 950hPa, TVOC 8, 412ppm CO2, 3.21V
uplink._note: Synthetic frame exercising the two's-complement negative-temperature branch (raw 0xFE00 = 65024 -> -512/100 = -5.12C); expected.data computed from reference/upstream-codec.js then normalized.

uplink.description: config packet (10 bytes): carries device configuration, no climate measurement
uplink._note: Synthetic config frame; upstream decodes it to device settings only. With no vocabulary measurement to emit, our codec reports an error instead of empty data.
Synthetic short frame; upstream returns undefined for this length, which violates the output contract, so our codec returns an explicit error.
